steps.title: Identify the defining clue
steps.content: The passage explains that excavating a pachycephalosaur fossil can take "weeks or even months of hard, physically tiring work." The blank must describe the nature of the excavation process using a single adjective consistent with that description.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
The blank needs an adjective that matches the idea of hard, exhausting labor lasting weeks or months.
  • Choice A — cheap: means inexpensive; the passage focuses on physical effort and time, not cost. ✗
  • Choice B — rapid: means fast; the passage explicitly says the process takes weeks or months, which is the opposite of rapid. ✗
  • Choice C — common: means ordinary or frequent; the passage describes how demanding the process is, not how often it occurs. ✗
  • Choice D — difficult: means hard to do; this directly captures weeks or months of hard, physically tiring work. ✓
D is correct.
